伊朗威胁 OpenAI 位于阿布扎比的 Stargate 数据中心

Iran threatens OpenAI's Stargate data center in Abu Dhabi

www.theverge.com 作者 marksully 分数 64 评论 1 2026/04/07 17:29
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. 艾玛·罗斯 (Emma Roth) 是一位新闻撰稿人，报道流媒体战争、消费技术、加密货币、社交媒体等领域。此前，她是 MUO 的作家和编辑。据 Tom’s Hardware 早些时候报道，伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队 (IRGC) 发布了一段视频，威胁如果美国兑现攻击该国发电厂的威胁，OpenAI 计划中的阿布扎比​​数据中心。该视频于 4 月 3 日发布在伊朗国家支持的新闻媒体的 X 账户上，视频称 IRGC 将对该地区与美国有联系的能源和科技公司进行“彻底彻底的消灭”，然后展示了 OpenAI 在阿拉伯联合酋长国正在建设的价值 300 亿美元的 Stargate 设施的图片。OpenAI 价值 5000 亿美元的 Stargate 项目包括来自 Oracle、Nvidia、Cisco 的投资。软银。目前尚不清楚阿布扎比数据中心实际完工了多少，因为 2025 年 10 月的更新显示这些设施已开始建设，将包含 16 吉瓦的计算能力。最新消息称，建设工作“进展顺利”，将实现 2026 年部署 200 兆瓦的目标。OpenAI 没有立即回应 The Verge 的置评请求。除了 Google 地图上的 OpenAI 阿联酋数据中心的卫星图像外，IRGC 的视频还显示了支持该项目的高管的照片，该照片将思科首席产品官 Jeetu Patel 误认为是微软首席执行官萨蒂亚·纳德拉 (Satya Nadella)。 周末，唐纳德·特朗普总统在 Truth Social 上威胁伊朗，称如果伊朗不开放霍尔木兹海峡，周二将是“发电厂日和桥梁日”。特朗普周日还告诉美国广播公司新闻，如果伊朗不与美国达成协议，美国计划“炸毁整个国家”。伊朗外交部周一回应了特朗普的威胁，称其“决心全力捍卫我们的国家安全和主权。”关注此故事中的主题和作者，在您的个性化主页源中查看更多类似内容并接收电子邮件更新。艾玛·罗斯

Original Summary

  1. Emma Roth is a news writer who covers the streaming wars, consumer tech, crypto, social media, and much more. Previously, she was a writer and editor at MUO.Iran’s Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) has published a video threatening OpenAI’s planned Abu Dhabi data center if the US follows through on threats to attack the country’s power plants, as reported earlier by Tom’s Hardware. The video, which was published to an Iranian state-backed news outlet’s X account on April 3rd, says the IRGC will carry out the “complete and utter annihilation” of US-linked energy and technology companies in the region, before showing an image of OpenAI’s $30 billion in-progress Stargate facility in the United Arab Emirates.OpenAI’s overarching $500 billion Stargate project includes investments from Oracle, Nvidia, Cisco, and SoftBank. It’s not clear how much of the Abu Dhabi data center is actually finished, as an October 2025 update showed the beginnings of the facilities that will contain 16 gigawatts of compute power. The update said construction was “well underway” and would meet its target of deploying 200 megawatts in 2026. OpenAI didn’t immediately respond to The Verge’s request for comment.Along with what appears to be satellite imagery of OpenAI’s UAE data center from Google Maps, the IRGC’s video also shows a photo of the executives backing the project, which misidentifies Cisco’s chief product officer, Jeetu Patel, as Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella.Over the weekend, President Donald Trump threatened Iran on Truth Social, saying Tuesday will be “Power Plant Day, and Bridge Day” if the country doesn’t open the Strait of Hormuz. Trump also told ABC News on Sunday that the US plans on “blowing up the entire country” if Iran doesn’t reach a deal with the US. Iran’s Foreign Ministry responded to Trump’s threats on Monday, saying it’s “determined to defend our national security and sovereignty with all might.”Follow topics and authors from this story to see more like this in your personalized homepage feed and to receive email updates.Emma Roth
